programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Adrian has injuries to his face and has been bitten on his arm breaking up a fight in the city centre. Andys had a motorbike accident. And Connors fallen 12 feet off a roof.

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours in...
programme.desc: Jessica Fostekew and Joe enjoy a Canarian caper in Lanzarote, as they trike through the lunar landscape, sample volcanic vino and cactus croquettes, and explore the Jameos del Agua lava tunnels.

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: In Stratford-upon-Avon, George Clarke helps Laura and Jonnie to transform their mock-Tudor Edwardian house. And in Essex, Nickis 1920s cottage needs major changes.

programme.title: Matt Baker: Our Farm in the Dales
programme.desc: Its time for the hay harvest, a seasonal job that provides the animals with enough food to get them through the winter. Matt begins the epic job of mowing the meadows, drying the grass and baling it up.

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: In Bulgaria, Colin and Paul give their horse-back riding a trial trot. In Spain, hoteliers Jo and Ken find out if their business-boosting experiments have moved the dial.

programme.title: Jasmine Harmans Renovation in the Sun
programme.desc: Despite husband Jons accident, work continues as Jasmines dad comes to help. And fellow presenter Laura Hamilton tries to lift Jasmines spirits with a trip into Málaga.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: John and Carole have different ideas on where to buy their first home together. Will it be the wild coastline of west Wales or charming Carcassonne in the south of France?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Sharon and Brendon want to buy a holiday home beside beautiful Lake Garda, but they each have very different priorities... Can Lucy Alexander fulfil their dreams?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Dundee, the first to cook is alarm company owner Bill Black, who plans a belt-busting menu for his guests.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Architectural technician Alex Pithouse is second to host in Dundee and plans on giving his guests an education in fine dining with a complex menu and some fine wines. He also looks forward to introducing his guests to his three pet ferrets.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Vegetarian cat lover Hannah Wilson is cooking Italian in Dundee and has a cunning plan to win over her carnivore guests - dish up some meat with her starter.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Fourth to cook in Dundee is self-styled food critic Phil Petrie, who has been less than impressed with the standard of food so far. Phil has big plans for his night, only to run out of ingredients, leaving his guests feeling hungry.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final night in Dundee, Kim Gillespie plans a `Yorkshire-themed menu featuring dishes from Spain and Thailand, accompanied by a Scottish choir singing American songs.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It: Brilliant Builds
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer take a look back on their biggest builds with complete overhauls, including a higgledy-piggledy layout in Huddersfield to wall-to-wall woes in Woodford.

programme.title: George Clarkes Building Home
programme.desc: Laura and Daniel want their son to have the same idyllic childhood that Laura had on Mersea Island, Essex. But converting an old beach house on a tiny budget turns into a nightmare.

programme.title: Devon and Cornwall
programme.desc: On Dartmoor, Steve and Crispin ready their sheep for a speed shearing competition. In Looe, everyone gears up for the big one-mile wild swim from St Georges Island back to the town beach.

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off: Stand Up To Cancer
programme.desc: Molly-Mae Hague, Richard Herring, JoJo Siwa and Babatunde Aleshe make decorated traybakes, tarte tatin and recreate their childhood toys in biscuits.

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Fifteen-year-old Meldred is rushed into AandE after being stabbed in the thigh by a stranger while walking to school. Sports commentator Andrew has an inflamed ankle with blood spots and a rash.

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Security guard Weston manages a violent incident with a patient, revealing the challenges of working on the hospital frontline. 33-year-old Jack is rushed into AandE after falling from a horse. And seven-year-old Lyla has a finger infection.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britains sharpest armchair critics share more of their sharp, insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional critiques of the weeks biggest and best shows on television.

programme.title: Help! I Bought It at Auction with Sarah Beeny

programme.title: George Clarkes Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: A couple create an ambitious floating home, two siblings build their own mobile homes away from home, and George and Will conjure up a magical 30-mile vista in a wall just 20cm thick, in their secret-garden studio flat.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: How do doctors, patients and their families deal with a diagnosis of terminal cancer? Meanwhile, Dr Pearces recently bereaved patient is displaying classic symptoms of bereavement.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: Every bed in the department is occupied, but there are still 20 patients waiting for the next one to be vacated. Lead Nurse Steph is already struggling to manage the mounting number of patients when the emergency alarm sounds.

programme.desc: Motorcyclist Danny is rushed into the emergency department following a high-speed road traffic accident in north Wales, and nurse Rita is booked in for life-saving surgery to remove her cancerous kidney.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Underdog Gets Away
programme.desc: Monicas first Thanksgiving dinner for the gang goes horribly wrong when they all get locked on the roof after watching a giant runaway balloon from the New York Thanksgiving parade. Elsewhere, Joey wins his first modelling gig as the poster boy for a venereal disease campaign, and Ross competes with his ex-wife to communicate with their unborn baby.

programme.title: Friends

programme.title: Animal Park
programme.desc: Cute critters and caring keepers. Kate Humble and Ben Fogle explore Longleat Safari Park, meeting a host of exotic, fascinating animals and the people who look after them.

programme.title: Farm 999
programme.sub-title: Fly-Tippers Get Caught in the Act
programme.desc: Farmers confront criminals, wildfires rage and hidden horrors emerge on a Welsh farm.

programme.title: Crimewatch Caught
programme.desc: A van driver calls 999 after making a horrific discovery and police must determine if hes telling the truth or covering a terrible crime. Plus the hunt to catch a right-wing extremist.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.sub-title: Celebrity Special with Jacqui and Frankie from The Traitors
programme.desc: Jacqui has recruited Frankie from The Traitors, but will she be faithful to an auction property in Kent? We trawl the archives to see a Cornwall cottage Martin visited in 2013 that took quirky to a whole new level. Martin is also in Bristol where a mid-terrace is in pretty decent condition.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: The red and blue teams find out whether they bought wisely when their items sell at auction in Lyme Bay. Both experts take a punt on small bonus buys, but for one the reward is big!

programme.title: BBC News at One
programme.desc: The latest national and international news, followed by weather.

programme.title: BBC London News
programme.desc: News, sport and weather from London.

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Elaine and Paul in Mickleover love all things 50s - 50s cars, 50s clothes, 50s music and 50s dancing. But Elaine also loves fairies.

programme.title: Celebrity Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Pop superstar, H from Steps - aka Ian Watkins - along with his partner Tom, put property expert Denise Nurse through her paces as she attempts to find them the perfect family home in the beautiful South Wales countryside where H was born and raised. Denise presents a selection of homes fit for an international musical icon and the couple teaches her some of the local lingo, whilst they all try their hands at sheep herding and spill the tea on a visit to a Welsh tea plantation.

programme.title: The Sound of Music
programme.desc: Classic film version of the Rodgers and Hammerstein musical in which a novice nun leaves her convent to accept a position as governess to a large family. Despite their initial misgivings, she wins over the seven children and their disciplinarian father by sharing her love of music, but their happiness is threatened by the Nazi invasion of Austria. The film won five Oscars.

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong is joined by co-host Gethin Jones for the brainy quiz where the contestants try to score as few points as possible by plumbing the depths of their general knowledge to come up with the answers no-one else could think of.

programme.title: BBC News at Six
programme.desc: The latest national and international news, followed by weather.

programme.title: BBC London News
programme.desc: News, sport and weather from London.

programme.title: The Marvellous Miniature Workshop
programme.desc: Sara Cox meets restaurateur Karim, who asks for a miniature of his secondary school, St Pauls Way, a safe haven during his childhood when racism was rife in his east London neighbourhood. Miniaturist Abi painstakingly recreates the maths classroom of his favourite teacher, leaving a special clue that leads to an emotional surprise when the model is revealed.

programme.title: The One Show
programme.desc: JB Gill and Angellica Bell bring you the stories that matter from across the country.

programme.title: Extraordinary Portraits
programme.sub-title: Iron Gran: Im in My 80s and Doing Triathlons
programme.desc: The UKs oldest female Ironman triathlete is immortalised in paint, but should artist Caroline Pool capture Eddies fun-loving energy or the quiet steeliness beneath the surface?

programme.title: Beyond Paradise
programme.desc: A couple are targeted by a burglar who repeatedly sneaks back in to clean up without a trace. With several potential suspects, Humphrey must uncover who is out for revenge.

programme.title: Have I Got News for You
programme.desc: Roy Wood Jr hosts the first in a new series, with guest panellists Armando Iannucci and journalist Anushka Asthana joining team captains Paul Merton and Ian Hislop to delve into the latest news.

programme.title: The Young Offenders
programme.desc: Finally back together, Conor and Jock meet an older couple who seem similar in many ways, then accidentally take them hostage.

programme.desc: The latest national and international news, with reports from BBC correspondents worldwide.

programme.desc: News, sport and weather from London.

programme.title: The Claudia Winkleman Show

programme.desc: John Beckwith and Jeremy Grey are a pair of committed philanderers who sneak into weddings in a bid to pick up women.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: The BBCs Breakfast programme features the latest news, sport, business, weather and other items on a daily basis.

programme.title: Saturday Kitchen Live
programme.desc: Matt Tebbutt is joined by chefs Jeremy Lee, Paul A Young and Roberta dElia, and by special guest Joel Dommett. Drinks expert Olly Smith picks the wines to go with the studio dishes. There are also great moments from the BBC food archive.

programme.title: Flaming Feasts
programme.desc: Chris cooks Waless highest pancake on Yr Wyddfa, grills a quarrymans supper in Dinorwig Quarry and ends with a landmark whole-cow BBQ in Llanberis.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: The new owner of a terrace in Crewe isnt put off by the numerous safety bolts on the front door. The seasoned developer turns it into a smart HMO (house in multiple occupation), while a father-and-daughter team modernise a semi in Doncaster. A former estate agent takes two years to extend and transform a Gravesend house into a smart, boutique-style HMO.

programme.title: BBC Weekend News
programme.desc: National and international news, followed by weather.

programme.title: BBC Weather
programme.desc: The latest weather forecast.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Todays Bargain Hunt comes from Detling in Kent, where Natasha Raskin Sharp is leading proceedings. Caroline Hawley and Raj Bisram give the teams a helping hand as they go in search of profit-making finds to sell at auction. Natasha takes time out with a cup of tea as she checks out Teapot Island, which houses a collection of more than 8,000 novelty teapots, and discovers how they became a kitchen fashion accessory.

programme.title: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: Woodworker Bruce has a plan. He has some wood, but can he create luxurious loungers from Jacquis garden furniture bound for the skip?

programme.title: Puss in Boots: The Last Wish
programme.desc: Puss in Boots discovers that his passion for adventure has taken its toll when he learns that he has burnt through eight of his nine lives. Puss sets out on an epic journey to find the mythical Last Wish and restore his nine lives.

programme.title: Attenborough and the Giant Egg
programme.desc: David Attenborough returns to the island of Madagascar on a very personal quest. In 1960 he visited the island to film one of his first ever wildlife series, `Zoo Quest. Whilst he was there he acquired a giant egg - the egg of an extinct bird known as the `elephant bird - the largest bird that ever lived. Fifty years on, he now returns to the island to find out more about this amazing creature.

programme.title: BBC Weekend News
programme.desc: National and international news, followed by weather.

programme.title: BBC London News
programme.desc: News, sport and weather from London.

programme.title: BBC Weather

programme.title: Match of the Day LIVE
programme.sub-title: FA Cup, Quarter-Final: Chelsea v Port Vale
programme.desc: FA Cup football as Port Vale of League One travel to Chelsea with a semi-final place at Wembley at stake. The Valiants are the lowest ranked side left in the competition and are struggling at the foot of their division. However, they knocked out Premier League side Sunderland in the fifth round and will be hoping to pull off an even bigger shock against Liam Roseniors Blues in this quarter-final. Kelly Cates presents from Stamford Bridge alongside Jimmy Floyd Hasselbaink and Danny Murphy.

programme.title: Match of the Day LIVE
programme.sub-title: FA Cup, Quarter-Final: Southampton v Arsenal
programme.desc: Coverage from St Marys Stadium as Championship club Southampton look to cause a huge FA Cup upset against Premier League leaders Arsenal. Up for grabs is a place in the semi-finals at Wembley. Presented by Mark Chapman, with guests Micah Richards and Theo Walcott, who played for both clubs. Commentary by Guy Mowbray and Alan Shearer.

programme.desc: National and international news, followed by weather.

programme.title: BBC Weather

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee and Lucy are moving house and viewing a property that Lucy loves when, embarrassingly, Lee needs the loo. Before he can use it however, a second buyer turns up to take a look at the property. To dissuade him from putting in an offer. Lee pretends to be the vendor.

programme.title: The Outfit
programme.desc: Leonard is an English tailor who makes suits on Londons famous Savile Row. He must outsmart a dangerous group of criminals to survive a fateful night.

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Elaine and Paul in Mickleover love all things 50s - 50s cars, 50s clothes, 50s music and 50s dancing. But Elaine also loves fairies.

programme.title: Celebrity Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Pop superstar, H from Steps - aka Ian Watkins - along with his partner Tom, put property expert Denise Nurse through her paces as she attempts to find them the perfect family home in the beautiful South Wales countryside where H was born and raised. Denise presents a selection of homes fit for an international musical icon and the couple teaches her some of the local lingo, whilst they all try their hands at sheep herding and spill the tea on a visit to a Welsh tea plantation.

programme.title: The Sound of Music
programme.desc: Classic film version of the Rodgers and Hammerstein musical in which a novice nun leaves her convent to accept a position as governess to a large family. Despite their initial misgivings, she wins over the seven children and their disciplinarian father by sharing her love of music, but their happiness is threatened by the Nazi invasion of Austria. The film won five Oscars.

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong is joined by co-host Gethin Jones for the brainy quiz where the contestants try to score as few points as possible by plumbing the depths of their general knowledge to come up with the answers no-one else could think of.

programme.title: The Marvellous Miniature Workshop
programme.desc: Sara Cox meets restaurateur Karim, who asks for a miniature of his secondary school, St Pauls Way, a safe haven during his childhood when racism was rife in his east London neighbourhood. Miniaturist Abi painstakingly recreates the maths classroom of his favourite teacher, leaving a special clue that leads to an emotional surprise when the model is revealed.

programme.title: Flaming Feasts
programme.desc: Chris cooks Waless highest pancake on Yr Wyddfa, grills a quarrymans supper in Dinorwig Quarry and ends with a landmark whole-cow BBQ in Llanberis.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: The new owner of a terrace in Crewe isnt put off by the numerous safety bolts on the front door. The seasoned developer turns it into a smart HMO (house in multiple occupation), while a father-and-daughter team modernise a semi in Doncaster. A former estate agent takes two years to extend and transform a Gravesend house into a smart, boutique-style HMO.

programme.title: BBC Weekend News
programme.desc: National and international news, followed by weather.

programme.title: BBC Weather
programme.desc: The latest weather forecast.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Todays Bargain Hunt comes from Detling in Kent, where Natasha Raskin Sharp is leading proceedings. Caroline Hawley and Raj Bisram give the teams a helping hand as they go in search of profit-making finds to sell at auction. Natasha takes time out with a cup of tea as she checks out Teapot Island, which houses a collection of more than 8,000 novelty teapots, and discovers how they became a kitchen fashion accessory.

programme.title: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: Woodworker Bruce has a plan. He has some wood, but can he create luxurious loungers from Jacquis garden furniture bound for the skip?

programme.title: Puss in Boots: The Last Wish
programme.desc: Puss in Boots discovers that his passion for adventure has taken its toll when he learns that he has burnt through eight of his nine lives. Puss sets out on an epic journey to find the mythical Last Wish and restore his nine lives.

programme.title: Attenborough and the Giant Egg
programme.desc: David Attenborough returns to the island of Madagascar on a very personal quest. In 1960 he visited the island to film one of his first ever wildlife series, `Zoo Quest. Whilst he was there he acquired a giant egg - the egg of an extinct bird known as the `elephant bird - the largest bird that ever lived. Fifty years on, he now returns to the island to find out more about this amazing creature.

Out of the town and up into the Mountains Steve meets the rarest wolf on earth and discovers why a grass-munching monkey, the Gelada baboon, has a set of teeth that would make a vampire jealous.

programme.title: The Mask
programme.desc: Eye-popping comedy about a mild-mannered bank clerk who is transformed into a zoot-suited, cartoon-style creature after finding a strange mask in a river. Wearing the mask gives him superhuman abilities and enables him to defeat all who stand in his way. He vows to woo a beautiful nightclub singer, but is unaware of her criminal intentions.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: As commissioner Selwyn Patterson celebrates 50 years of police service at the Yacht Club, the day takes a turn when he is shot and rushed to hospital. However, the case grows increasingly perplexing as the team learn more about the assailant.

programme.title: Stacey Dooley: Blood, Sweat and T-Shirts

programme.title: Stacey Dooley: Blood, Sweat and T-Shirts
programme.desc: The group embark on the most shocking leg of their journey so far in Mumbai, as they are put to work in the backstreet factories of Dharivi, the largest slum in Asia.

programme.title: The Trials of Pa Salieu

programme.title: Top Gear

The trio take an Aston DBS Volante, a Ferrari California and a Lamborghini Gallardo Spyder to Romania in search of an obscure stretch of tarmac that some hard-core drivers claim is nothing less than the greatest road in the world. James compares two powerful limos, the BMW 760i and Mercedes S63 AMG.

programme.title: Murdered by My Father
programme.desc: Every parent wants the best for their kids, and Shahzad is no exception. Ever since his wife died hes been trying to keep his two kids Salma and Hassan on track. Salma is growing up quickly, and Shahzad wants to make sure shes set up with the right guy to settle down with. Its a promise he made his wife, and part of what he considers his duty as a dad.

programme.title: Stacey Dooley: Blood, Sweat and T-Shirts
programme.desc: The six young fashion lovers travel to West Delhi to live and work alongside the migrant tailors of a backstreet workshop, entering a world where the workers can spend up to 15 hours a day at their sewing machines.

programme.title: Doctor Who

Meanwhile, Mike is shocked to find someone from their insurance company on his doorstep - an unannounced visit to check the details of the gatehouse fire. Can Mike convince her that lightning really can strike thrice?

programme.title: Ghosts

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: Lotto fever has hit Foleys bar, and it doesnt take long before rumours swirl around Finglas that Agnes is the jackpot winner. Meanwhile, a DNA test and the surprise return visit of Cathys childhood friend leaves Agnes with questions.

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: Dermot and Maria decide to renew their wedding vows, forcing Agnes to organise the ceremony alongside arch-nemesis Hillary and cope with her high-society demands. Meanwhile, Fathers Damien and Trevor go on a mountain pilgrimage that goes wrong.

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Janet struggles to cope with her loss after Jonny is gunned down by the police, while Louise tries to avoid all blame for the shooting. Meanwhile, grief softens Gazs sex-drive but Donna finds an inventive way to arouse him.

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Donna discovers a dreadful secret in her dead mums house, Louise decides to tell Jonny the awful truth about Janet and Gaz, and Jonny gets scared to leave the house.

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Jonny gets some very exciting news, Janet and Gaz take extreme measures to stop Louise blackmailing them, and Donna decides to spend, spend, spend, until Gaz drops a bombshell.

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Jonnys new car gives him trouble with women, Donna takes revenge on Gaz for sleeping with Janet, and Louise fights dirty to win Jonnys forgiveness for getting him shot.

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Jonny has been banned from the off licence and Louise is fed up that she cant get a job. Donna fears that Kelly may have developed a crush on her.

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Gaz gets into trouble when his plans for Jonnys stag night go seriously wrong, and Louise tries to make Janets hen party into the wildest ever.

programme.title: The Trials of Pa Salieu

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.sub-title: Celebrity Special with Martel and Nitro from Gladiators
programme.desc: Martel and Nitro are duelling with each other over ideas at a studio flat in London. We delve into the archives all the way back to 2009, when Martin was charmed by a Grade II listed house in Devon. Martin is also in Somerset, where another character property is ripe for reinvention.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Dean restores a pair of shoes with a surprising past, Mark revives a retro recording device, and Sonnaz and Angelina pair up to salvage a battered survivor of heady days in London.

programme.title: Lifeline
programme.desc: This months Lifeline appeal is on behalf of Ovarian Cancer Action, a charity campaigning to increase awareness and fund scientific research into the disease.

programme.title: King of Kings
programme.desc: Colourful dramatisation of the birth, life and death of Jesus Christ. The film also depicts the tensions between Herods court and the Roman administration, the execution of John the Baptist at Salomes behest, and the story of Barabbas, told in counterpoint to that of Jesus.

programme.title: Impossible
programme.desc: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

programme.title: The Tournament
programme.desc: Eight contestants compete in a series of fast-paced quiz battles in an attempt to eliminate their opponents from the days game and walk away with a cash prize.

programme.title: Coast
programme.desc: Coast ventures to the farthest-flung reaches of the British Isles to explore `Life Beyond the Edge. Mark Horton is in Liverpool to meet an old friend. Brunels famous ship the Great Eastern now lies beneath the mud, but Mark is resurrecting the story of her greatest triumph - how she conquered the Atlantic by connecting Britains edge to America with 2,000 miles of telegraph wire.

programme.title: Funeral in Berlin
programme.desc: Spy Harry Palmers assignment is to smuggle a Russian agent who is defecting to the West across the Berlin Wall and back to England - in a coffin. However, Harry discovers that the Russian may not be all he appears.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael Aspel and a team of experts examine curios and artefacts offered up by the public in Eston, Cleveland. Exciting finds include a sculpted elephant by Eduardo Paolozzi, a Victorian painting, the first commercially produced toy robot from the 1930s, and a collection of craft jewellery.

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: Today, Flog It! is at Blackburn Cathedral in the centre of Blackburn in Lancashire. Charles values a wooden Fijian club, while two vintage enamel signs catch Philips eye. Paul Martin takes a look at the impressive Talbot collection.

programme.title: Richard Osmans House of Games
programme.desc: Each week a group of four celebrities compete to test their knowledge in a series of quick-paced rounds of games. Host, Richard Osman then cross-examines the celebrities as they strive to increase their scores and match Richards mental prowess.

programme.title: Beechgrove Garden
programme.desc: Celebrating the great Scottish garden. Tips and advice to get the most out of your garden, with inspirational ideas from Scotlands most beautiful green spaces.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its judging day, and only one chef can go through to represent Northern Ireland. Award-winning Belfast director Lisa Barros DSa helps decide the winner from the two remaining chefs.

programme.title: Gardeners World

programme.desc: The family are stuck in a traffic jam on their way to the seaside and tempers are fraying. Tish is eager to lighten the mood and imagines the car is a submarine, and Tish and Tash explore the ocean.

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: On the way to Padgets shop, Bing and Flop stop to play with Arlo the cat. Bing loves Arlo and knows just where he likes to be stroked and what games he likes playing. On the way home, Bing spots a new cat but this one isnt so friendly and scares Bing when he tries to play with it.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies go on a day trip to the Hidey Hup. They take turns on the Tubby Bouncy, the Tubby Slidey and the Tubby Spinny, before they go on the Tubby Uppy Downy together.

programme.title: Tee and Mo
programme.desc: Its a hot day and Tee and Mo line up for a cool relaxing drink. Mo must find a way to occupy Tee whilst they are queuing without annoying Mr Rhino, who is waiting behind them.

programme.title: Supertato
programme.desc: Evil Pea takes all the toys in the supermarket for herself and the Cobs to play with. Supertato climbs a big wall of boxes to try and get the toys back.

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: Its vaccination day! Bing knows it might hurt a little but he is looking forward to the special shiny Hoppity Voosh sticker he will get from Doctor Molly. Bing is brave, but when he goes to get his sticker after his vaccination, he finds out that there are none left! Bing is upset- but then Pando mistakes Bings disappointment for pain, and Doctor Bing has to help.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: Bryan gets spooked and thinks theres a lake monster lurking in the mists. Itll be Mojo and Bo who have to find the monster or show Bryan that theres no monster at all.

programme.title: Hey Duggees Squirrel Club
programme.desc: What were the Old Deers like as babies? And what if the Squirrels were puppets?

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Its bridge building time. The Squirrels help a quarrelling group of Gerbils sort out their longstanding disagreement.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: On a trip to the beach, Mum teaches Bluey how to throw. Bingo and Dad get creative with a funny shaped stick.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey plays mum to a brood of bouncy balloons, including an irrepressible floater named Greeny. Mum and Bluey play `Mum School, in which Mum agrees to teach Bluey how to control her rowdy kids and be a better mum.

programme.title: Go Jetters
programme.desc: Lars and Glitch team up and build a fruit-picking machine that runs on methane to help with the Academy harvest. When they run low on fuel, they head to the natural methane deposits of Azerbaijan to stock up. But when the Grimbots take too much methane from a huge volcano, the Go Jetters must work to protect the tourists and save the Grimbots from a fiery explosion.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.sub-title: The Tale of the Fish Out Of Water
programme.desc: Peter Rabbit wants to grow up to be just like his late father - he has big paws to fill. But with his fathers journal and the help of his best friends Benjamin and Lily, Peter is ready for some fun and delightful new discoveries.

programme.title: Octonauts: Above and Beyond
programme.sub-title: The Octonauts and the Beetle Invasion
programme.desc: Kwazii and grandfather Calico Jack find a new island home for a band of beetles.

programme.title: Numberblocks
programme.desc: Its a lovely day for a picnic, but one of the flapjacks is missing. Three may have forgotten what Numberblocks do best.

programme.title: Alphablocks
programme.desc: Its big bop night at the Alphadrome, but bossy bass player B falls out with drummer D over musical differences. She doesnt need her brother to make the blocks boogie, does she?

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bingo is convinced that the Easter Bunny has forgotten them like last year, until Bluey finds a series of clues that leads them on an Easter egg treasure hunt.

programme.title: CBeebies House
programme.desc: Join all of our friends for singing, dancing and smiles as we celebrate CBeebies together.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.sub-title: The Tale of the Start of Spring
programme.desc: When Jemimas new egg goes missing, only Peter Rabbit is able to put together the clues and find the culprit. But can he find the egg before it hatches, or has he finally met his match in the devious newcomer, Samuel Whiskers?

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: While looking for things to sell in their shop, Bing and Sula find their old friend Mr Rainybow, but his head is completely gone. So they decide to sell him, and after a nice lady buys his stacky bit for her toilet rolls, they look for some more things to sell. But then they find Mr Rainybows head and are sad that they cant get the rest of him back. However, Charlie loves to knock down Mr Rainybows rings.

programme.title: Yakka Dee
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say `egg and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of different eggs, a brown egg, a white egg, we even see inside an egg. Theres a dippy egg, a fried egg, an egg being laid and what will come out of the hatching egg? Theres a gold egg, a cold egg and Dee and her friends even have an egg and spoon race.

programme.title: Lu and the Bally Bunch
programme.desc: Gus demands Lu play by the rules.

programme.title: Twirlywoos
programme.desc: The Twirlywoos are on a stage watching a performer balancing blocks. He keeps dropping the blocks, so the Twirlywoos decide to try balancing things themselves!

programme.title: Something Special: Were All Friends
programme.desc: Justin and his friend head to a marina for lots of boating fun. Meanwhile, Mr Tumble has ordered a new inflatable boat to take fishing. What could possibly go wrong?

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Po makes lots of silly, funny sounds with the levers and buttons in Home Dome and then the Tubby Phone rings for a silly tubby phone dance.

programme.title: The Baby Club
programme.desc: Nigel and Baby Bear welcome babies Theo, Dionne, Francis, Oliver, Minnie and their grown-ups to The Baby Club. All the parents and babies have different dressing-themed toys and objects, which are explored through play, songs and a story.

programme.title: I Spy, You Spy
programme.desc: Elsee visits a farm with her friend Hugo and plays a game of I Spy.

programme.title: I Can Grow It
programme.desc: Springtime is in full flow, and there are lots of different plants and flowers popping up in the city garden. Nelly and Isla are teaming up with Aaron to see what amazing plants they can find, and theyve brought their teddies along for the journey too.

programme.title: Monster Makes
programme.desc: Rebecca and Murphy are trying to come up with a new move to perfect their competition dance routine. They take a break for an ice-cold monster shake and find time to create a bottle penguin. The Mini Monsters demonstrate how to make everlasting sandcastles, and Rebeccas aunt calls from space - where she has made some alien friends. The Recycling Express arrives with empty tissue boxes, inspiring a mega monster make - a funny pineapple puppet.

programme.title: Vegesaurs
programme.desc: Ginger and the Peas discover a more efficient way to explore the valley - by tunnel!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey and dad tease mum about being fussy when packing to go to the pool. But when they arrive underprepared, they realise that mum was right all along.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: The Squirrels are trying to count how many badges Duggee has when they come across his Counting Badge. He got it for counting to 100.This sounds like hard work.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.sub-title: Top of the Pups: Row Your Boat
programme.desc: Mr an Mr Crab sing Row Your Boat as they take a ride down the river together.

programme.title: Lets Go for a Walk
programme.desc: Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers go on a special walk through the town that starts in the daytime but finishes with a torch game in the dark. On the way they spot a spiky tree, have a close-up look at a daisy and light up their reflectors in the dark.

programme.title: Our Family
programme.desc: Today, sisters Iona and Elba make their familys famous shortbread biscuits and throw a picnic with teddy bears. Out in the park, they play at launching rockets into the sky. One of the rockets lands in a stream.

programme.title: My World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Larrys Chinese Tofu, Egg and Prawn
programme.desc: Preschool series celebrating foods from a rich diversity of backgrounds. Larrys family come from China. China is famous for its wonderful food, so Larrys friends are very excited to come over for his Chinese-themed meal. Larrys steamed tofu, egg and prawn recipe is cooked in his mums special steamer but it can be made in an ordinary oven too. Larrys mum has even made some vegetable fried rice to serve with his dish.

programme.title: Teeny Tiny Creatures
programme.desc: At a nature reserve with Rory, Sandy and Zoe play at being earwigs using their pincer litter pickers for the leaves, and Chantelle meets a superbug expert in a beautiful allotment.

programme.title: Dog Squad
programme.desc: Meagaidh the Border Collie is a search and rescue dog who works with her owner Tom. Her supernose follows scents and smells like clues, so they can rescue people who need their help. Meagaidh and Tom are visiting a school to show the children how a search and rescue dog works. They demonstrate some of their equipment, including Meagaidhs special doggy goggles, which she wears to keep the wind and dust out of her eyes when shes in the helicopter.

programme.title: Steve and Aneeshwar Go Wild
programme.desc: Steve and Aneeshwar meet some agile gibbons who show them how well they can move. Though the gibbons are a little quiet, Steve and Aneeshwar have a go at showing what they sound like in the wild. Next, they meet a tall, long-legged bird called a seriema who is very interested in a pretend toy snake, before they reveal the unusual wild connection between the two animals.

programme.title: Waffle the Wonder Dog
programme.desc: Its Evie and Dougs first playdate together with their friends. They try out their new ball pit, but Waffle cant join in because hes not toilet trained. He finds fun elsewhere.

programme.title: Puffin Rock
programme.desc: Animated series for children.

programme.title: Small Potatoes
programme.desc: In this upbeat, hip hop song, the Small Potatoes introduce themselves and sing about their unique personalities.

programme.title: Yukee
programme.desc: Stripes has written a brilliant song, but his guitar string is broken, so he cant play it. Yukee decides to surprise Stripes by enlisting his garden friends to sing the song to him. The trouble is they cant find the right pitch to sing the song in!

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Duggee is a big, friendly dog who runs The Squirrel Club, an after-school activity club where children can learn and take part in all kinds of activities, have fun adventures, and earn badges for their achievements.

programme.title: Yakka Dee
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say `bath and we go on a whirlwind word adventure.

programme.title: Numberblocks
programme.desc: The Numberland Rescue Team take on a series of urgent missions for the Numberblobs.

programme.title: Alphablocks
programme.desc: Alphablocks IR meet the birthday girl, throw an amazing party for her and make her special wish come true.

programme.title: Something Special
programme.desc: Justin and his friend take a day trip on a horse-drawn canal boat, while Mr Tumble and Tumble Ted are heading to the seaside in the Tumble Car - if he remembers how to start it!

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies accidentally leave the Tiddlytubbies gate open, and some of them escape into Home Dome. The Teletubbies must find them all and then close the gate.

programme.title: Patchwork Pals
programme.desc: Patchwork Spider has a problem, he wants to play music on his net but the music sounds bad. The Patchwork Pals find a way to help him.

programme.title: Raa Raa the Noisy Lion
programme.desc: Topsy is having a party and Raa Raa is helping organise the games, but not everybody is good at them. Can Raa Raa and his friends come up with new games that all the friends are good at and enjoy?

programme.title: Chuggington

programme.title: Gigglebiz
programme.desc: With a puff of smoke, Wizard Tripwick appears and bumbles his way into his classroom. Once inside, loveable Wizard Tripwick does his best to teach his wizarding pupils a spell to make bananas appear out of thin air. Down on the allotment, Humphrey is intrigued by his neighbours metal detector and quickly gets to work looking for buried treasure. Humphreys search sends his neighbour tumbling into a hole, but together they make an exciting find.

programme.title: Andys Prehistoric Adventures
programme.desc: Andy jumps into his time-travelling clock and heads back 3 million years, where he runs into some ancient primates and joins their tribe. He helps them fend off a prehistoric big cat, before having his trusty backpack stolen by vultures.

programme.title: The Game Catchers
programme.desc: The Game Catchers are five friends who travel through space exploring fantastic planets with one big mission: to discover, play and collect all the games in the universe.

programme.sub-title: Octonauts and the Baby Sea Turtles

programme.desc: Tired of being constantly humiliated, the predators devise a plan that will get rid of that pesky Peter Rabbit once and for all... if they can work together long enough to pull it off!

programme.desc: An Iowa man rigs a $16.5 million lottery jackpot, triggering the biggest lottery scam in American history; notorious New York City landlord Steven Croman finds a new home in jail.

programme.title: Converge
programme.desc: Exploring the intersection between innovation, investment, leadership and sustainability across business, sports and entertainment.

programme.title: Veer
programme.desc: Veer takes on the conniving King of Madavgarh as well his own jealous tribesmen. At stake is his love for princess Yashodhara and his fathers honour.

programme.title: Lorie
programme.desc: After a young woman tragically has a miscarriage, she meets a little boy who has been accidentally abandoned by his family and looks after him as if he were her own.

programme.title: Bemisal
programme.desc: The story of a deprived boy, who is brought up in a privileged family and indebted for virtually everything he has.

programme.title: Mohra
programme.desc: A journalist comes to the aid of a murderer with a life sentence, when she makes an appeal in court, and although he is given his freedom, they soon discover that there is a grim reason behind his release.

programme.title: Gupt
programme.desc: The day after a heated argument between Sahil and his father, the father is found dead, and Sahil given a life sentence, but he manages to break out of prison and sets out to find his fathers true murderer.

programme.title: Rab Ne Bana Di Jodi
programme.desc: After the wedding ceremony between Surinder Sahni and Taani, Surinder discovers that his new wife cares little for him. When she decides to enter a dance competition, Surinder disguises himself, joins the class and tries to befriend her. Taani soon falls in love with her new dance partner, Raj, unaware that he is in fact her husband.

programme.title: Bhoot Police
programme.desc: Two brothers, Vibhooti and Chiraunji, have fought their share of ghosts. A new case forces them to rethink their own abilities and beliefs.

programme.title: Aankhen
programme.desc: A former bank employee coerces a woman to train three blind individuals to help him rob his former employer.

programme.desc: The host interviews various media personalities, shares the latest news of the Bollywood industry and reviews the newest movies.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Absurd comedy about a likeable buffoon who turns the most ordinary situations into moments of excruciating embarrassment. Mr Bean rushes to his exam only to find out hes studied the wrong subject. He then goes to the beach but struggles to change into his swimming trunks discretely. Later on, he has difficulty attending a church service without drawing attention to himself.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Mr Bean wants to give a busker some money until he realises he has no change, while afterwards he goes shopping but gets carried away. Later, he treats himself to a birthday dinner but is disappointed with his dish. Finally, Mr Bean attends a royal film premiere in order to meet the Queen, with disastrous results.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Mr Bean goes to a swimming pool but finds himself terrified of the high diving board; afterwards, he must try several imaginative ways to get out of the car park when he doesnt have enough money to pay. He then demonstrates the proper way to make a sandwich whilst out at the park. Finally, when Mr Bean and his girlfriend go on a date to watch a horror movie he teases her for being scared, until the film actually starts.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Mr Bean buys a portable television but cant get it to work properly. Then, when his camera is stolen, he must identify the suspect in a police line up. Afterwards, he attends a magic show and disco with his girlfriend but ends up embarrassing her.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Mr Bean rushes to the dentists office after oversleeping, then helps a boy fix his remote-controlled toy boat, and later is menaced by a wasp while having a picnic.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Mr Bean resuscitates a heart attack victim at the bus stop, has problems mailing a letter after accidentally swallowing the stamp, and decides to go on holiday.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Mr Bean goes Christmas shopping, conducts a Salvation Army band, and has Christmas dinner with his long-suffering girlfriend.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Mr Bean treats himself to a weekend at a posh hotel where he manages to get himself into one embarrassing situation after another.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Mr Bean throws a New Years Eve party, finds some bargains at a sale, and creates havoc when decorates his room.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Mr Bean goes to the funfair but is surprised to find that a guest has joined him for the day.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.sub-title: The Best Bits of Mr Bean
programme.desc: Loveable buffoon Mr Bean has the unique talent of turning the most ordinary of situations into moments of excruciating embarrassment.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Joey Speaks French
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler discover that their prospective adoptive childs biological father may be a `shovel killer, Ross and Rachel get dangerously close when they go to visit her sick father, and Phoebe struggles to teach Joey French for an audition.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel makes the mistake of going for a job interview at a restaurant where her current boss is also dining. Phoebe discovers she can change her name to whatever she likes - Princess Consuela Bananahammock seems the logical choice, until Mike proves that two can play her game - and Joey, upset that Chandler and Monica are moving, is comforted by an eight-year-old.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: When Rachel makes a startling announcement, Ross secretly schemes to get her former job back for her. Meanwhile, Joey is so flustered by all of the upheaval in his friends lives that Phoebe prevents him from learning about the sudden death of his agent. Monica and Chandler make a stunning discovery after they check out the house for sale next door to their new home.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With Rachels Going Away Party
programme.desc: As Rachel prepares to leave for Paris, the gang throw a farewell party for her. Instead of facing them all together, she takes each of them aside for a private goodbye. One friend is offended when he is excluded. Meanwhile, Monica barks out orders as she packs precisely for her life in the suburbs with Chandler, and they watch closely the pregnant mother of their future adopted child.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The six friends prepare to say goodbye to each other.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where It All Began
programme.desc: An introduction to the gang. After Rachel leaves her Mr Potato Head look-alike fiance Barry at the altar, she moves in with Monica and discovers that independence sucks when you dont have Daddys credit cards to rely on. Meanwhile, Chandler and Joey encourage Ross to experience the advantages of bachelorhood, and Phoebe supports herself by playing guitar in the subway.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Sonogram at the End
programme.desc: Rosss lesbian ex-wife is pregnant with his child and he doesnt like her choice of last name for the baby. Elsewhere, Rachel finds out that her ex-fiance went on what would have been their honeymoon with her maid of honour.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica finds it difficult to break up with her latest boyfriend whom everyone likes, Chandler is reunited with his beloved cigarettes, and Phoebe receives a large sum of money.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: While the men attend a hockey game and end up at a hospital, the women spy on President Clintons top aide, George Stephanopoulos, who lives across the street. Meanwhile, Rachel receives her first pay packet.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the East German Laundry Detergent
programme.desc: While Chandler and Phoebe decide to break up with their significant others on the same night, Ross and Rachel have their first date doing laundry together.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: An agent offers Joey a movie role as Al Pacinos naked body double, Ross tries to be less conservative, and Chandler thinks his fantasies have come true when he has an affair with a married woman.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: A power cut leaves Chandler stranded in a bank with a gorgeous woman, Ross tries to ask Rachel out on a date, and Joey learns that Monica used to be infatuated with him.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Nana Dies Twice
programme.desc: Monica and Ross mourn the death of their grandmother with a little help from the gang, and Monica and her mum come to an unspoken understanding about the relationship between mothers and daughters. Meanwhile, Chandler is irritated by office speculation that he is gay.

programme.title: Lee Evans Live: The Different Planet Tour
programme.desc: Lee Evans took his show on a 114 date tour across 63 different towns, finally returning to the West End for one more performance.

programme.desc: Hollywood director Colin tackles a `Spiderman bank heist scene using unashamed nudity, Elvis impressions and catwalk model poses. Guest starring Lauren Cohan from `The Walking Dead.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the East German Laundry Detergent
programme.desc: While Chandler and Phoebe decide to break up with their significant others on the same night, Ross and Rachel have their first date doing laundry together.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: An agent offers Joey a movie role as Al Pacinos naked body double, Ross tries to be less conservative, and Chandler thinks his fantasies have come true when he has an affair with a married woman.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: A power cut leaves Chandler stranded in a bank with a gorgeous woman, Ross tries to ask Rachel out on a date, and Joey learns that Monica used to be infatuated with him.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Nana Dies Twice
programme.desc: Monica and Ross mourn the death of their grandmother with a little help from the gang, and Monica and her mum come to an unspoken understanding about the relationship between mothers and daughters. Meanwhile, Chandler is irritated by office speculation that he is gay.

programme.title: Lee Evans Live: The Different Planet Tour
programme.desc: Lee Evans took his show on a 114 date tour across 63 different towns, finally returning to the West End for one more performance.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: The team is joined by guest comic Jonathan Mangum and special guest actor Lea Thompson, as they play games including Weird Newscasters, Worlds Worst, Duet, Scenes from a Hat, and Helping Hands.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway? USA
programme.desc: A lively round of Questions at airport security and guest Tiffany Coyne blasting out an 80s anthem.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway? USA
programme.desc: Hollywood director Colin tackles a `Spiderman bank heist scene using unashamed nudity, Elvis impressions and catwalk model poses. Guest starring Lauren Cohan from `The Walking Dead.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats
programme.desc: Highlights from series 11, hosted by Jimmy Carr with team captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson. With guests Jack Dee, Jedward, Sarah Millican, Amy Childs, Micky Flanagan, Jack Whitehall, Charlie Brooker and Gok Wan.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats
programme.desc: Stand up comic and presenter Jimmy Carr is back to oversee the disputes and deliberations on all the topical events that set the great British publics chins wagging. Team captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson thrash out the hot stories of the week, from the silly to the serious. The first guests are British boxing sensation Amir Khan, `The IT Crowds Richard Ayoade, as well as comics Holly Walsh and Josh Widdicombe.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: This week, the Jokers are raising hell at Raising Canes, and following that, asking for help to carry some furniture. At the end, one of them will be strapped to a speeding race car for his punishment ? or is it?

programme.title: Comedy Central Presents
programme.desc: Comic Kevin Hart discusses topics such as being part of a married couple and arguing and growing up dumb.

programme.title: CC Stand-Up: The Bonnaroo Experience
programme.desc: Stand-up comics featured at the Bonnaroo Music and Arts Festival.

programme.title: Rosie Tries to Help
programme.desc: Rosie thinks mums lead boring lives, so its time to inject some fun into their worlds. Accompanied by Kerry Godliman, Rosie takes a group of mums on a day of fun theyll never forget.

programme.title: RENO 911!
programme.desc: The deputies continue to investigate the murder of Sheriff Chechekevitch at his funeral.

programme.title: Key and Peele
programme.desc: A football team hypes up before a game, President Obama and Luther meet Hillary Clinton, guys prepare for potential flight threats, pirates sing pirate songs, a trigger-happy policeman.

programme.title: Gold Rush
programme.desc: The boys are back in Alaska (although Discovery dropped the states mention in the title after the first season) hoping to strike it rich mining for gold. Their first effort was anything but rich and glorious, however, as the crew led by Todd Hoffman and his father, Jack, sunk $250,000 into their dream and came away with just $20,000 worth of gold. The dismal summer was filled with injuries, malfunctioning equipment and constant fighting among the greenhorn miners, yet their serious case of gold fever trumps any talk of giving up and leads to a new operating plan in order to salvage their dream. The series also keeps tabs on the efforts of teenager Parker Schnabel and old-timer Dakota Fred to hit the mother lode at separate sites.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Mine Rescue With Freddy and Juan
programme.desc: Freddy and Juan fly to an urgent SOS from a mine in North Carolina that a former Marine inherited from a war buddy. Without the use of their equipment, the miners operation poses a challenge to the boys.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Mine Rescue With Freddy and Juan
programme.desc: In Arizona, a scientist turned miner gambles his retirement funds to secure a legacy for his son. Freddy and Juan turn up the heat to fix the miners innovative, self-designed dry washer to save the mine.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Mine Rescue With Freddy and Juan
programme.desc: With nearly forty years of mining under his belt, Freddy Dodge goes on the road to help struggling mine owners to hit the mother lode. He teams up with Juan Ibarra to overhaul washplants, introduce gold recovery techniques and transform operations.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Mine Rescue With Freddy and Juan
programme.desc: A 17-year-old mining prodigy, his father and grandfather wrestle with wintry weather to get their season underway in central Alaska. With another snowstorm brewing on the horizon, Freddy and Juan race to complete fixes before its too late.

programme.title: How Its Made
programme.sub-title: Underwater Robots, Lasagne, Band Saws, and Ski Trekking Poles

programme.title: Gold Rush: Mine Rescue With Freddy and Juan
programme.desc: With nearly forty years of mining under his belt, Freddy Dodge goes on the road to help struggling mine owners to hit the mother lode. He teams up with Juan Ibarra to overhaul washplants, introduce gold recovery techniques and transform operations.

programme.title: Gold Rush
programme.desc: The boys are back in Alaska (although Discovery dropped the states mention in the title after the first season) hoping to strike it rich mining for gold. Their first effort was anything but rich and glorious, however, as the crew led by Todd Hoffman and his father, Jack, sunk $250,000 into their dream and came away with just $20,000 worth of gold. The dismal summer was filled with injuries, malfunctioning equipment and constant fighting among the greenhorn miners, yet their serious case of gold fever trumps any talk of giving up and leads to a new operating plan in order to salvage their dream. The series also keeps tabs on the efforts of teenager Parker Schnabel and old-timer Dakota Fred to hit the mother lode at separate sites.

programme.title: Filthy Fortunes
programme.sub-title: Fab Four and a Big Score
programme.desc: A police officers house in North Carolina is packed with fishing gear, rare Beatles records, guns and knives. In Tennessee, sports memorabilia has taken over a familys home; total sales top $100,000. And a client is moved to give Matt a tribute.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Fred and his team open the doors to more hopeful singletons looking for love, including 25-year-old Sasha, waiter Sam, 28-year-old executive PA Victoria and 38-year-old sales manager Scott.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitchell isnt sure how to tell Cam that his mother makes him feel uncomfortable, Haley finally breaks up with Dylan and Jay has a little stomach ache.

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Jack plans a haunting, horror-themed wedding, while bride-to-be Becka dreams of a traditional Scottish affair. Stay tuned to see if Jacks concept proves to be a screaming success.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Cameron and Mitchells friends mistakenly assume they have split up and Haley attempts to cook Thanksgiving dinner as a thank you for Claire and Phils support with the twins.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitchell suspects Cameron has an ulterior motive for keeping everyone happy for Christmas dinner. Claire tries to dodge Jays job offer to work at his dog bed company. Luke has to deal with the consequences of kissing Mannys ex-girlfriend Sherri.

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: A short clip from Rude Tubes naughty little sister Rude-ish Tube, featuring food and animals.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon visits Italian bistro Charlies in La Verne, Southern California, which was bought in 2010 by Tatiana Leiva, her mother and her sister. Tatiana didnt actually put any money into the purchase herself, but her hard-working mother and sister did because they felt they were helping to fulfil Tatianas dream. They even put up their houses as collateral! Unfortunately, soon Charlies was in trouble.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: While throwing a telethon at their college, Barry attempts to woo Ren by promising to get Hall and Oates to perform. Beverly attempts to set Bill up, but things go awry when he finds happiness with a woman he meets through Beverlys enemy.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam and Breas relationship is going well until Beverlys over-involvement causes them to fake a break up. Lainey is back, which throws Barry for a loop regarding his blossoming relationship with Ren.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claires plans for a family portrait go awry, Cam unleashes his inner diva and Mitch gets into a flap.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil finally agrees to sell the old station wagon, Mitchell decides to build a life-size princess castle for Lily and Manny invites a cute girl over for a study date.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Lisa spots a new bestie from the bus, she swaps TV dinners for a cool and cultured family. But her double life cant last long.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Im Dancing as Fat as I Can
programme.desc: A binge-cheating Homer angers Marge when he watches her favourite show without her. Then, Bart gets ready for Krustys Holiday Trample.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Clown Stays in the Picture
programme.desc: Homer is forced to confront Comic Book Guy in court when he takes the kids joyriding in his car.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: From a rockabilly tattooist who loves to shoot, to a gym bunny, cheesemaker, and a multilingual entrepreneur who loves a man in a suit, everyones looking for love on their first date.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels to Baltimore to try to turn around a restaurant that is suffering because its owner, Denise Whiting, has managed to alienate the surrounding community. When Denise opened Cafe Hon in 1992 it was a roaring success, but as a result of her unwavering business ambition the local community decided to boycott the restaurant, leaving Denise frustrated by falling sales.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Day the Earth Stood Cool
programme.desc: Homer wants a younger and hipper image, so he starts hanging out with Terrence and Emily, his cool new neighbours from Portland.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When a fire at the retirement home forces Grampa to move back in with the Simpsons, Homer throws out his back on moving day.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: While Jay continues to adjust to life with his young Latino bride and her sensitive son, Claire tries to keep a leash on husband Phil and their brood, and gay couple Mitch and Cam experience the marvels and mayhem of bringing up their adopted Vietnamese baby.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire becomes a determined neighbourhood vigilante hoping to catch and stop a menacing car that speeds through their streets. Meanwhile, Phil is busy trying to land an important listing with a difficult client, Jay teaches Manny how to ride a bike (only to learn that Gloria needs lessons too) and Mitchell and Cameron stumble upon a mysterious neighbour who is quite the charmer.

programme.desc: Glo assigns a drag queen-themed group dance to boost the teams confidence, but rumours of Audreys return have everyone wigging out. Gina steps up, but a clash with Smiley sparks a meltdown and a mum vs. mum showdown.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A trendy new pastor asks Homer to be a church deacon, but when Homer starts to get a little too fervent, Bart asks Flanders for help finding their former pastor.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge books Bart in for piano lessons, and a distraught Homer becomes completely bald.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Homer and Marge are lost in an icy wilderness, they must push themselves to their limits to survive.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Strong Arms of the Ma
programme.desc: When Marge is mugged, she reacts by working out with weights, but goes too far and ends up as a steroid-crazed bully.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Rebecca loves swimming with sharks. Dominic cant swim, but will he take the plunge with her? And how will musician James react to singer Brocardes history of paranormal romance?

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Simon is about to sit his first driving test, and Will, Jay and Neil are very excited by the new possibilities. As soon as Simon has passed they plan to visit Thorpe Park to ride roller coasters and chase girls. There is one problem though.

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will finds out that going to a mixed-sex school isnt too bad after all as he pulls the most popular girl in the year above. Shes fit and according to rumour, sexually precocious.

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: The boys call Jays bluff and agree to go to the Camber Sands meeting of the Caravan Club to see if it really is like a massive orgy. Jays dad is on hand to give advice on all matters sexual, whether they want it or not.

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Its the end of term and Will been voted the chairman of the Christmas prom committee. Okay, he was the only person who wanted the job, but hes still taking it seriously, and has roped Simon, Jay and Neil in to help set it up.

programme.desc: Zoe is into the `natural look, but is struggling to meet someone who shares her enthusiasm, while Derry is worried that his jet-set lifestyle is ruining his chances of finding love.

programme.sub-title: The Return of the Formica King

programme.title: Seven Psychopaths
programme.desc: A struggling screenwriter finds himself inadvertently entangled in the criminal underworld when his knucklehead friends abduct a mobsters beloved Shih Tzu.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Journey to the Center of the Earth
programme.desc: On a journey to find the centre of the Earth, a scientist and a student find themselves in the lost city of Atlantis.

programme.title: Those Magnificent Men in Their Flying Machines
programme.desc: Newspaper publisher Lord Rawnsley puts up a £10,000 prize for the winner of a flight from London to Paris and soon his daughter Patricia, her would-be husband Richard, his rival for her hand and a motley collection of aviators are gathered, ready for the race to begin.

programme.title: Sister Act
programme.desc: A cabaret singer witnesses a murder and goes undercover as a nun. In the convent, she is put in charge of coaching the choir, which she transforms into a toe-tapping rhythm group. As a result, the churchs congregation swells until even the Pope comes to witness pop classics such as `My Guy performed to glorify the Lord, but of course, her fame gives away her hiding place to the killer.

programme.title: A Few Good Men
programme.desc: A young and impetuous naval lieutenant and a more experienced officer are given the job of defending two marines accused of murder. As the two officers come to terms with one another, their investigation uncovers some sinister secrets and collusion at the highest level. The marines commanding officer certainly has no intention of making the truth public.

programme.title: The Green Mile
programme.desc: Paul Edgecomb, the head guard of death row, just wants life for him, his colleagues and the condemned to be nice and easy. However, when Michael Clarke Duncan, a man-mountain convicted of murdering two little white girls arrives, things start to get strange. How can he cure Edgecombs urinary infection with a touch, bring a dead pet mouse back to life and cure the wardens wifes cancer? Is he innocent?

programme.title: Glass
programme.desc: David Dunn looks to deliver vigilante justice to the Beast -- the madman who has superhuman strength and 23 personalities. Their epic showdown leads them to the mysterious Elijah Price, the criminal mastermind who holds critical secrets for both men.

programme.title: Michel Rouxs Provence Masterclass
programme.desc: Michel takes Sunday lunch to the next level. He serves fish quenelles, chicken cooked in salt crust pastry and red wine poached pears with galette serpentine.

programme.title: Michel Rouxs Provence Masterclass
programme.desc: Michel serves up a feast thats made to share. He prepares a smoked fish platter, a rich beef cheek bourguignon and a lattice-topped salted caramel and walnut tart.

programme.title: Michel Rouxs French Country Cooking
programme.desc: Michel Roux Jr showcases the unique cuisine of Southern France. He shares his secrets to easily mastering French country cooking at home.

programme.title: Michel Rouxs French Country Cooking
programme.desc: Michel Roux Jr showcases the unique cuisine of Southern France. He shares his secrets to easily mastering French country cooking at home.

programme.title: Roux Down The River
programme.desc: Michel goes fishing with an old friend and makes an alfresco fish dish by the river. Plus, he makes watercress soup, a winter salad, and roast apples.

programme.title: Roux Down The River
programme.desc: In Southend, Michel meets a family of fishmongers and chefs keeping it local. Plus, he makes scallop curry, prawn toast, and fried custard beignets.

programme.title: Roux Down the River
programme.desc: Michel Roux finds the perfect fish and chips and visits Monkey Island at Royal Windsor. He cooks a mackerel burger, shepherds pie, and a peach meringue.

programme.title: Tom Kerridge Secrets of the Pub Kitchen
programme.desc: Tom Kerridge picks popular items on the menus at modern British pubs and gives them his own twist. He takes inspiration from modern gastropubs to create simple, contemporary, and delicious recipes.

programme.title: Tom Kerridge Secrets of the Pub Kitchen
programme.desc: Tom Kerridge picks popular items on the menus at modern British pubs and gives them his own twist. He takes inspiration from modern gastropubs to create simple, contemporary, and delicious recipes.

programme.title: Tom Kerridges Sunday Lunch
programme.desc: Tom brings an all-time favourite dish to his Sunday table: fish and chips. He bakes a beautiful side of salmon in brown butter and makes perfect triple-cooked chips.

programme.title: Tom Kerridges Sunday Lunch
programme.desc: Tom pays homage to the South of France. He makes a seafood bouillabaisse with sea bass, red mullet and shellfish, and praline and chocolate profiteroles.

programme.title: Mary Berrys Foolproof Cooking
programme.desc: Mary cooks up a celebration of five delicious dishes suitable for those special days, when youre having people around for dinner or simply want to treat a loved one at home. To start, Mary prepares some delicious salmon fillets with herbs and red pepper with a foolproof side of spiralized veg, perfect for any dinner party.

programme.title: Mary Berrys Foolproof Cooking
programme.desc: Mary cooks up a celebration of six delicious dishes perfect for outdoor entertaining and lazy summer days. To start, she prepares a luxurious whole sea bass with lime and dill butter that couldnt be simpler.

programme.title: Mary Berrys Easter Feast
programme.desc: Mary discovers the traditions followed by diverse British families and communities during Lent and Good Friday and the food that brings them together as each prepare for the great Easter celebration.

programme.title: Mary Berrys Easter Feast
programme.desc: Mary explores the wonderful foods that bring each different community together on Easter Sunday, the most symbolic and meaningful feast in the Christian calendar. As well as sharing her own family favourites, like mouth-watering Roast Lamb, Mary discovers how the Greek Orthodox community break the fast with Tsoureki bread; spends a day with the Archbishop of York, John Sentamu, cooking up a storm in his kitchen; and discovers Filipino and Italian Easter specialities.

programme.title: Rick Steins Seafood Odyssey
programme.desc: Its all go as Rick celebrates the abundance of seafood and the rich colourful sauces of Naples, or Napoli, and visits Suffolk to experience North Sea cod with cabbage and beer.

programme.title: Rick Steins Seafood Odyssey
programme.desc: Its home and away for seafood fan Rick as he catches turbot off the Cornish coast and cooks it with cider and cream, and travels to Goa for prawn caldene and spicy Goan lobster.

programme.title: Rick Steins Seafood Odyssey
programme.desc: Seafood king Ricks off to Galicia in Spain to sample some rare shellfish. Plus recipes for hake with peppers and saffron, and clams in a marinara sauce.

programme.title: Rick Steins Seafood Odyssey
programme.desc: This programme looks at the preparation of a spicy shark vindaloo and the making of an authentic dhal with lentils. Plus a visit to Chesapeake Bay in America, where freshwater oysters and crab cakes are the order of the day.

programme.title: Jamies Fish Suppers
programme.desc: Chef Jamie Oliver presents recipes to inspire fish lovers to try different types of seafood.

programme.title: Jamies 15 Minute Meals
programme.desc: On the menu are flashy fish stew, saffron sauce and garlic bread, plus seared Asian beef, best noodle salad and ginger dressing.

programme.title: Jamies 15 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Jamie makes his best fish baps, mushy peas and tartare sauce. Later, he cooks mushroom farfalle with blue cheese and a hazelnut and apple salad.

programme.title: Jamies 15 Minute Meals
programme.sub-title: White Fish Tagine and Spicy Cajun Chicken
programme.desc: Jamie cooks white fish tagine, carrot, mint and clementine salad, plus spicy Cajun chicken, smashed sweet potato and fresh corn salsa.

programme.title: Jamies 15 Minute Meals
programme.sub-title: Asian Fish and Ultimate Pork Tacos
programme.desc: Asian fish, miso noodles and crunchy veg, and ultimate pork tacos, spicy black beans and avocado garden salad.

programme.title: Jamies 15 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Jamie cooks grilled tuna, `kinda Niçoise salad, Thai chicken laksa and mildly-spiced noodle squash broth.

programme.title: Jamies 15 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Jamie rustles up seared Asian tuna, coconut rice and jiggy jiggy greens, plus ricotta fritters, tomato sauce and courgette salad.

programme.title: Jamies 15 Minute Meals
programme.sub-title: Green Tea Salmon and Modern Greek Salad
programme.desc: Featuring green tea salmon, coconut rice and miso greens, plus modern Greek salad, spinach, chickpea and feta parcels.

programme.title: Jamies 15 Minute Meals
programme.desc: On the menu is smoked salmon, Yorkshire pudding, beets and asparagus, plus gorgeous Greek chicken, sweet pepper and pea couscous with tzatziki.

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Casey travels to Louisville, Kentucky, for some epic eats, including a booze-infused Southern staple, a one-of-a-kind spicy popcorn, and frozen hot chocolate challenge in nearby Santa Claus.

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Casey visits St, Louis, Missouri, in search of the biggest and best the city has to offer. He encounters a four-pound meatball and tackles a New York-style pizza so massive hell need the help of a partner to take it down.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Barbecue wings and ribs in Brooklyn, NY; crab quesadillas, tuna tacos and shrimp in North Carolina.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: This trip, Guys warming up with some stand-out specialties. In Brooklyn is a mom and pop diner flipping an apple waffle with pancetta, and deep-frying breakfast empanadas.
